_comment: Shared single source of truth for the teammate-layout-changed envelope wire shape (T0). Exercised by BOTH the Rust serializer (src-tauri/src/teammate/layout_event.rs golden_envelopes_round_trip) and the front-end parser (src/lib/teammate/layoutEvent.test.ts). Keeping one canonical fixture means the cross-end contract stays in lock-step even though the Rust lib unit-test harness can't launch on every host (0xc0000139) — the runnable vitest side validates the same shapes. Entry key = case name; value = exact JSON the backend emits. Add a case here when adding a LayoutChange variant.
